why_it_fits: A broad proxy for recurring household spend, especially groceries, everyday goods, and pharmacy-led traffic.
risk_watch: Low-margin retail; mix shifts and consumer trade-down can change profit capture even if basket demand stays firm.
alpha_note: Defensive consumption proxy, but lower alpha because the basket is consensus, mature, and already institutionally owned.
